evidence.title: README (segment 1)
evidence.excerpt: Hulunote is an open-source outliner note-taking application with bidirectional linking. Inspired by Roam Research, designed for networked thought. Like the hippocampus organizes memories in the brain, Hulunote organizes your knowledge — and now AI helps you build, connect, and retrieve it.

evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: - **Outliner Structure** — Organize thoughts in hierarchical bullet points with infinite nesting - **Bidirectional Links** — Connect ideas with `[[wiki-style links]]` and backlinks - **Daily Notes** — Journaling with automatic date-based pages - **Multiple Databases** — Separate workspaces for different projects - **Built-in MCP Client** — Connect to AI models and MCP servers directly from the app - **AI Note Generation** — Let AI organize, summarize, and generate notes for you

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: Hulunote embraces the **AI + Note Hippocampus** philosophy: AI acts as your cognitive co-pilot, helping you capture, organize, and retrieve knowledge just like the hippocampus does for memory.

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: [hulunote-mcp-server](https://github.com/hulunote/hulunote-mcp-server) lets any MCP-compatible client (Claude Desktop, etc.) read and write your Hulunote notes via natural language:

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: ``` "List my databases" → "Create a note about quantum computing" → "Add outline nodes with key concepts" ```

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: [openclaw-hulunote-assistant](https://github.com/hulunote/openclaw-hulunote-assistant) brings Hulunote into the OpenClaw AI agent platform, enabling autonomous note management:

evidence.title: v1.1.0
evidence.excerpt: # 🚀 Hulunote v1.1.0 — MCP Reasoning & Major UI Upgrade This release focuses on **AI-powered note operations and a major UI upgrade**. Hulunote now supports **MCP reflective reasoning**, enabling AI to think through note structures and perform batch operations across your knowledge base. --- ## ✨ Highlights ### 🧠 MCP Reflective Reasoning Hulunote now supports **reflection-based reasoning through MCP**. AI can: * Analyze note structures * Perform **multi-step reasoning** * Execute **batch note organization tasks** This allows AI agents to **think before acting**, improving accuracy when working with large knowledge bases. --- ### 🔌 Hulunote MCP Server Integration You can now connect directly to the **Hulunote MCP Server**. This enables: * AI-driven **batch note organization** * Automated knowledge restructuring * Programmatic note operations through MCP tools Your notes are no longer just documents — they become **structured data that AI can operate on**. --- ### 🖱 Major UI Upgrade The editor interface has been significantly improved. New capabilities include: * **Drag-and-drop node movement** * More fluid outliner interactions * Improved layout and usability Working with large …

evidence.title: v0.1.0
evidence.excerpt: # 🚀 Hulunote v0.1.0 — First Public Release Hulunote is now publicly available. An open-source outliner note app **with a built-in MCP client** — turning your knowledge base into an AI tool workspace. --- ## ✨ Core Features ### 🧩 Built-in MCP Client (Major Feature) Hulunote works like **Claude Desktop / Cherry Studio / VS Code AI tool integrations**. You can: * Connect to **your own MCP servers** * Configure custom tools * Use AI tools directly inside your notes Your note app becomes a **local AI tool hub**. --- ### 📝 Outliner Notes * Infinite nested bullet structure * Fast structured thinking workflow --- ### 🔗 Bidirectional Links * `[[wiki-style links]]` * Automatic backlinks * Networked knowledge instead of folders --- ### 📆 Daily Notes Automatic date-based journaling. ### 🗂 Multiple Databases Separate workspaces for different projects. --- ## 🏗 Stack Rust (Axum, SQLx) + ClojureScript + PostgreSQL --- ## 🎯 What This Release Proves Hulunote shows that: > **Notes + Knowledge Graph + MCP Tools can live in one workspace.** Not just writing. Not just AI chat. But a structured thinking environment that can call tools. --- Feedback and contributions welcome. **Full Changelog**:…
